cards.title: GARV AI Ops Advisor
cards.description: GARV AI Ops Advisor is an intelligent, AI-powered analyst designed to transform operational decision-making for airports and airlines. It leverages Generative AI, agentic orchestration, machine learning, and big data analytics to deliver on-demand, personalised, and prescriptive insights through a conversational interface. This project is the universal Airops Assistant called GARV AI powering these solutions.

cards.title: Turnaround Management System [Staff]
cards.description: End-to-end turnaround visibility: from gate assignment and ground handling to departure readiness. Monitor tasks, delays, and resource utilisation across the apron.

cards.title: Turnaround Management System [Phases]
cards.description: Turnaround management by phases: track and manage each phase of the turnaround process.

cards.title: Fixed Resource Management System
cards.description: Manage fixed resources such as stands, gates, and counters. Allocate and track availability, conflicts, and utilisation to maximise operational efficiency.

cards.title: Check-in Performance Reports
cards.description: Access real-time and historical check-in performance metrics, queue times, and agent productivity. Optimise counter allocation and identify bottlenecks to improve passenger flow.
